name: Legal Scenario 01
description: Detect legal clause: Governing Law & Jurisdiction
prompt: This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of California.

name: Legal Scenario 02
description: Detect legal clause: Termination for Convenience
prompt: Either party may terminate this Agreement at any time without cause upon 30 days prior written notice.

name: Legal Scenario 03
description: Detect legal clause: Auto-Renewal
prompt: This Agreement shall automatically renew for successive one-year terms unless either party gives notice of non-renewal.

name: Legal Scenario 04
description: Detect legal clause: Non-Compete / Non-Solicitation
prompt: The Employee agrees not to compete with the Company in competitive activities for a period of two years after termination.

name: Legal Scenario 05
description: Detect legal clause: Limitation of Liability
prompt: The aggregate liability of either party under this Agreement shall not exceed the fees paid in the previous 12 months.

name: Legal Scenario 06
description: Detect legal clause: Indemnification
prompt: Each party shall indemnify, defend, and hold harmless the other party from and against all third-party claims.

name: Legal Scenario 07
description: Detect legal clause: Intellectual Property Ownership
prompt: All intellectual property created under this Agreement shall be solely and exclusively owned by the Client.

name: Legal Scenario 08
description: Detect legal clause: Liquidated Damages
prompt: In the event of a breach of schedule, the Vendor shall pay liquidated damages in the amount of $500 per day.

name: Legal Scenario 09
description: Detect legal clause: Force Majeure
prompt: Neither party shall be liable for delay or failure in performance due to Force Majeure, including acts of God.

name: Legal Scenario 10
description: Detect legal clause: Audit Rights
prompt: The Client shall have the right to audit the Contractor's financial books and records upon reasonable notice.

name: Legal Scenario 11
description: Detect legal clause: Exclusivity
prompt: The Supplier shall be the sole and exclusive provider of the products to the Buyer during the term.

name: Legal Scenario 12
description: Detect legal clause: Assignment
prompt: Neither party may assign or transfer its rights under this Agreement without the prior written consent of the other party.

name: Legal Scenario 13
description: Detect legal clause: Governing Law & Jurisdiction
prompt: The Governing Law of this contract shall be the laws of the State of Delaware.

name: Legal Scenario 14
description: Detect legal clause: Termination for Convenience
prompt: Either party can terminate this contract for convenience at any time without reason.

name: Legal Scenario 15
description: Detect legal clause: Auto-Renewal
prompt: This contract automatically renews unless written notice is given 60 days before the renewal date.

name: Legal Scenario 16
description: Detect legal clause: Non-Compete / Non-Solicitation
prompt: The Contractor agrees not to solicit the Company's clients or employees for 12 months.

name: Legal Scenario 17
description: Detect legal clause: Limitation of Liability
prompt: The Company's maximum liability is limited to the contract value.

name: Legal Scenario 18
description: Detect legal clause: Indemnification
prompt: The Contractor shall indemnify the Company against intellectual property infringement claims.

name: Legal Scenario 19
description: Detect legal clause: Intellectual Property Ownership
prompt: All right, title, and interest in the deliverables will vest exclusively in the Company.

name: Legal Scenario 20
description: Detect legal clause: Liquidated Damages
prompt: The penalty for early termination is agreed as liquidated damages of $5,000.
